from source import sqrt
import math

def test_sqrt_converges_to_true_value():
    result = sqrt(2, 0.01)
    expected = math.sqrt(2)
    assert abs(result - expected) <= 0.02, f"Expected sqrt(2, 0.01) ≈ {expected:.5f} within 0.02, got {result:.5f}"
